name: Locked MTD
description: Memory Technology Devices can expose firmware data that must not be writable after startup.
fwupd can check this using MTD MEMISLOCKED when the firmware flash is exposed as NOR.
failure-impact: Unlocked MTD devices may allow an attacker to modify firmware code or data.

failure-results.not-supported: MTD lock status could not be checked

resolution: Contact your OEM, who may be able to issue a firmware update.
